message:
fix(web/handlers): Method::GET → Method::Get for renamed fastapi-types enum (ft-kxptg)

fastapi_rust renamed the HTTP method enum variants from SCREAMING_SNAKE
to PascalCase in fastapi-types (Method::GET → Method::Get, etc.). Three
test fixtures in crates/frankenterm-core/src/web/handlers.rs still used
the old names, breaking test compilation under the `web` feature:

  - line 613: make_request helper
  - line 830: /panes endpoint test
  - line 842: /search endpoint test

Mechanical rename to Method::Get. No behavior change.

Scope: this unblocks the specific Method::GET E0599 errors ft-kxptg
was filed for. The wider `--features web` build still fails with
remaining asupersync type skew in web_framework.rs (TcpListener / Cx
mismatch), tracked as ft-gfawa / ft-7cp47; those are out of this
bead's scope.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
